_meta.exercise: Operation Desert Cipher — TechPay Detection Validation
_meta.lab_environment: CTI Lab Docker Compose (Elastic 8.13.4 + Sysmon SwiftOnSecurity v13.30)

results.reason: Lab does not have Entra ID / Azure AD connected to Elastic SIEM. AiTM token cannot be tested without cloud log ingestion.
results.recommendation: Deploy Entra ID sign-in log connector to Elastic SIEM (separate sprint). Compensating test: validate Entra ID Conditional Access alert in Microsoft portal manually.
Deploy to production. Add SCCM service account to allowlist before deployment to reduce FP rate.

hklm_test.reason: Rule scoped to HKCU only; HKLM variant not in rule

results.recommendation: HKCU coverage is correct (Desert Cipher uses HKCU). Add separate rule for HKLM variant (lower priority — requires admin rights). Mark as PARTIAL.
results.gap: HKLM Run key not covered — create DET-007B

results.recommendation: Deploy to production. Tune FP allowlist before deployment (check what installers create tasks via AppData in your environment).

results.test: Invoke-AtomicTest T1003.001 -TestNumbers 2 (direct LSASS dump) + custom 0x1010 test

custom_test_0x1010.reason: Custom test using direct OpenProcess with 0x1010 mask did not trigger Sysmon EID 10 — Sysmon rule filtering may exclude this mask in SwiftOnSecurity profile

results.recommendation: Update Sysmon config to include 0x1010 access mask in LSASS access monitoring rule. Current SwiftOnSecurity profile does not include 0x1010. Custom Sysmon config update needed.
results.gap: 0x1010 LSASS access mask not captured — requires Sysmon config update

results.recommendation: HIGHEST CONFIDENCE rule. Deploy immediately. No tuning needed — FP rate in production is near-zero.

bitsadmin_test.reason: Atomic test uses Start-BitsTransfer PowerShell cmdlet, not bitsadmin.exe

powershell_bits.reason: Rule only covers bitsadmin.exe binary; PowerShell BITS cmdlet creates jobs differently — no bitsadmin.exe process created

results.recommendation: Two fixes required: (1) Write separate rule for Start-BitsTransfer using PS module logs EID 4103. (2) Add network-layer detection: Sysmon EID 3 for svchost.exe connecting to non-Microsoft IP during BITS job. Desert Cipher specifically uses bitsadmin.exe — this gap is lower risk for the specific threat but must be closed.
results.gap: PowerShell BITS method not covered — create DET-007B (Start-BitsTransfer)

highest_priority_fixes: DET-007 FAIL: Add bitsadmin + Start-BitsTransfer BITS exfil coverage
DET-005 PARTIAL: Update Sysmon config to include 0x1010 LSASS access mask
DET-001 FAIL: Deploy Entra ID sign-in log connector to SIEM
